project.title: CL-MS OF hE1a (DHTKD1) or G729R hE1a with hE2o
project.projectDescription: CL-MS OF hE1a (DHTKD1) or G729R hE1a with hE2o to identify the possible difference in the interactions between hE1a-hE2o and G729R hE1a-hE2o
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: 1,1'-Carbonyldiimidazole (CDI, Sigma) linkers was used for cross-linking of the hE1a (wildtype and G729R E1a) and hE2o proteins. The hE1a (or G729R hE1a, 1 nmol, 33 µM subunits) was mixed with hE2o (1 nmol, 33 µM subunits) in 15µl of 20 mM K2HPO4 (pH 7.5)  reaction buffer containing 150 mM NaCl and 0.5 mM ThDP, 1 mM MgCl2, 10% glycerol. After incubating for 30 minutes at 20 °C, 1 µl of 1 M CDI stock solution in DMSO was added.  The cross-linked samples were digested by trypsin and glu-c, followed by SCX enrichment. The digested sample were analyzed by LC-MS/MS.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: LC-MS/MS peak lists were generated using the ProteoWizard 3.0.18156 and searched against the Swissprot database (proteome ID: UP000000558, search was done by using searchGUI-3.3.117 incorporated with peptideshaker 1.16.42).Cross-links were evaluated using software tool Merox 1.6.6 with the following parameters: precursor 5 ppm; fragment 15 ppm mass accuracy; CDI or BuUrBu set as cross-linker. The cross-linked peptides were manually validated, the results with FDR < 0.01 limit were exported.

experimentTypes.name: Chemical cross-linking coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

references.referenceLine: Zhang X, Nemeria NS, Leandro J, Houten S, Lazarus MB, Gerfen GJ, Ozohanics O, Ambrus A, Nagy B, Brukh R, Jordan F. Structure-function analyses of the G729R 2-oxoadipate dehydrogenase genetic variant associated with L-lysine metabolism disorder. J Biol Chem. 2020
